# value

**Instance Property**

A contact property value.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var value: ValueType { get }
```

## Discussion

A contact property value, such as [doc://com.apple.contacts/documentation/Contacts/CNPhoneNumber] for a phone number, NSString for an email address, and so on. For valid values, see [doc://com.apple.contacts/documentation/Contacts/CNContact] properties that are arrays of labeled value objects.

## Getting the label and value

- **label**: The label for a contact property value.
